## Summary

Describe the focused change.

## Security and permission impact

- Does this change notebook edit permissions, Agent mode access, sandbox selection, command execution, authentication, or terminal handling?
- Are any restrictions changed from hard enforcement to model instructions or vice versa?

## Testing

List the JupyterLab version, build commands, workflows, and manual scenarios tested.

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated where necessary
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] User-facing warnings and labels reviewed
- [ ] No credentials, private notebooks, or institutional data included
